name: GHOST
description: Heap buffer overflow in __nss_hostname_digits_dots() reachable via gethostbyname*().
LD_LIBRARY_PATH / stack-based buffer overflow in the dynamic linker's handling of malformed LD_ environment variables, usable for local privilege escalation.
Integer overflow in the memory allocation functions of glibc when processing large path/length arguments.
Out-of-bounds read in glob() when processing crafted glob patterns with GLOB_NOMAGIC/GLOB_TILDE.
Use-after-free in glob() during ~user pattern expansion.
Signed comparison vulnerability in ARM memcpy leading to buffer overflow.
Assertion failure (DoS) in iconv when processing crafted ISO-2022-JP-3 sequences.
Off-by-one buffer underflow/overflow in getcwd() when the buffer size exactly matches the path length; usable for local exploitation.
Buffer overflow in sunrpc svcunix_create() via long pathname (legacy sunrpc compat code).
Stack buffer overflow in sunrpc clnt_create() via overly long name.

name: Looney Tunables
description: Buffer overflow in ld.so's processing of the GLIBC_TUNABLES environment variable, exploitable for local privilege escalation on SUID binaries.
Heap buffer overflow in __vsyslog_internal(), reachable via syslog()/vsyslog() with a crafted program name or long message.
Out-of-bounds write in the iconv ISO-2022-CN-EXT conversion module.
Stack buffer overflow in nscd when processing a long netgroup name.
